title: A man in Goiânia-GO reported a close encounter with a UFO and 2 beings in his backyard [1990]”

text_preview: OCT 30th, 1990. Time: 15:40. Duration: 30 minutes. A resident of Goiânia, State of Goiás, reported having had two UFO experiences between October 1989 and October 1990. In the second, the witness claimed to be “3 meters” away from a UFO that landed in the backyard of his house. According to the witness, the unidentified flying object that “approached from the North” in a straight line, had a rectangular shape, size 5×3 [15 mt2], brown color and slow speed. The witness also stated that there were two beings with the “disk”, which “destroyed the flowers in the garden; they stained and left an un
summary: A Goiânia resident reported a 5x3m rectangular brown UFO landing in his backyard with two beings; the craft destroyed plants, left radioactive stones and rust marks.
